a quick file to wrangle the gam output, for easier incorporation into the report

```{r}
library(tidyverse)
source("./prius2/scripts/helper_functions.R")
```

```{r get species list}
spp.list.raw <- read_species_list(file_path = "./prius2/temp/",
                                  prius_version = 2) %>% 
  select(soort, GBIF_canonicalName, reg)

spp.list.raw$reg[!is.na(spp.list.raw$reg)] = 1
spp.list.raw$reg[ is.na(spp.list.raw$reg)] = 0
```

```{r}
gam <- read.csv("./prius2/output/GAM_outputs_2000_2025_Occupancy/summary4report_2026_03_08.csv")
```

```{r}
new <- spp.list.raw %>% 
  left_join(gam, by = "GBIF_canonicalName") %>% 
  select(!soort.y) %>% 
  arrange(desc(reg),
          GBIF_canonicalName)
```

```{r}
write.csv("./prius2/output/GAM_outputs_2000_2025_Occupancy/summary4report_2026_03_08_all.csv")
```
